{{Infobox character
| name = Governor Seiren
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]]
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Governor Seiren]] questions [[Raion]]'s desire to convince others.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28">''The Knight'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Governor Seiren]] is the Governor.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c29">''The Knight'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Governor Seiren]]'s family is the reason [[Visiria]] has a governor instead of a sovereign planetary government.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c33">''The Knight'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Governor Seiren]] is the [[Planetary Governor]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Oh my, does that mean you have no one else you wish to convince?” Governor Seiren asked.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
